docTitle: Beibele ka Mmapa · Beibele ka Pono e Tee
metaDesc: Latela lenaneonako la Testamente ya Kgale, bophelo bja Jesu, le maeto a Paulo mmapeng wa nnete — Beibele e diregile mafelong a nnete.

s.kicker: Beibele ka Pono e Tee · Dimmapa
s.title: Beibele ka Mmapa
s.verse: “Rena mola re le anegela tša maatla a Morena wa rena, Jesu Kriste, le tša go tla ga gagwe, re be re sa le theele dinonwane tša mahlajana a batho. Re be re le anegela tša borena bja gagwe bjo re bo bonego ka mahlo a rena.” (2 Petro 1:16)
s.purpose: Beibele ga se nonwane. Ke pego ya batho ba ba sepetšego mafelong a nnete, ka matšatšikgwedi le maina a nnete. Latela ditsela tšeo mmapeng, ka tatelano ya nako — kgotla ntlha, goba o gatele ▶ go sepela ka yona mothaladi ka mothaladi.
s.ot_kick: ① Testamente ya Kgale — go phatša nako
s.ot_h: Go tloga tlholong go fihla go boela Jerusalema
s.ot_lead: E sego leeto le le tee eupša ke go elela ga histori ya topollo go tloga tlholong go ya pele: tlholo le go wa → lefula le Babele → pitšo (Abrahama) → naga ye e holofeditšwego → go Etšwa → lešoka → go thopa → mmušo → karoganyo → bothopša → go boa.
s.je_kick: ② Testamente ye Mpsha — bophelo bja Jesu
s.je_h: Go tloga Betlelehema go fihla Jerusalema
s.je_lead: Latela bophelo bja Jesu ka fao Diebangedi di anegago ka gona, ka tatelano — go tloga matswalong a gagwe kua Betlelehema go feta kolobetšo le modiro wa gagwe kua Galilea, go phatša Samaria, go fihla sefapanong, tsogong le rotogong kua Jerusalema.
s.pa_kick: ③ Testamente ye Mpsha — maeto a Paulo
s.pa_h: Go tloga Antiokia go fihla magomong a lefase — Roma
s.pa_lead: Go tloga Pentekoste kua Jerusalema, ka fao ebangedi e phatlaletšego ka ntle ga Judea — go phatša Asia Nnyane le Yuropa go fihla pelong ya mmušo. Kgetha le le tee la maeto a mahlano (la 1 · la 2 · la 3 + leeto la go ya Roma + ka morago ga go lokollwa) mme o latele ditiragalo tša Ditiro le mangwalo ao a ngwadilwego tseleng.
s.foot: Ditsopolo · Mafelo a latela sengwalwa sa Beibele le tšeo di tlwaelegilego tša tšhupammapa ya Beibele (ka maina a lehono mo go thušago). Mabopo a lewatle, dinoka le matsha di thadilwe go tšwa go datha ya tšhupammapa ye e bulegilego (Natural Earth), e nolofaditšwe.
s.contact: Dipotšišo · maikutlo — Re romele imeile

eden.name: Edene (Tlholo · Go wa)
eden.note: Ka gare ga lefase le le dirilwego le le botse kudu, sebe se a tsena mme se roba tswalano gare ga Modimo le batho.
events: Tlholo ka matšatši a tshela — “go be go le botse”
Batho ba hlolwa ka seswantšho sa Modimo
Go wa, le go rakwa Edene
Kholofetšo ya mathomo ya ebangedi — “ditlogolo tša mosadi di tla pšhatlaganya hlogo ya noga”

noah.name: Ararate (Lefula)
noah.today: Thaba ya Ararate, Turkey bohlabela lehono
noah.note: Modimo o ahlola lefase le le tletšego sebe, eupša a boloka bophelo ka lapa le tee.
events: Lefase le tletše bobe
Lefula, le araka ya Noage
Kgwerano ya molalatladi — “lefula le ka se tsoge le sentše lefase gape”

babel.name: Tora ya Babele
babel.note: Kgahlanong le boikgogomošo bjo bo fihlelelago legodimo, Modimo o fapaganya polelo ya bona a ba a phatlalatša ditšhaba lefaseng.
events: “A re ageng motse le tora … re iphe leina”
Modimo o fapaganya polelo ya bona
Ditšhaba di phatlalala lefaseng (Shinare — ka morago Babilone)

ur.name: Ure
ur.note: Kanegelo ya Beibele ya topollo e thoma ka pitšo ya monna a tee.
events: Modimo o bitša Aborama go tšwa Ure ya Bakaladea
“Ke tla go dira setšhaba se segolo … ditšhaba tšohle di šegofatšwa ka wena”
Ka tumelo o tloga nageng ya gabo

haran.name: Harane
haran.note: Tseleng, a araba pitšo go leba naga ye e holofeditšwego.
events: Lapa la Tera le dula Harane
Tera o a hwa
Aborama o tloga go ya Kanana a na le mengwaga ye 75

shechem.name: Sikeme · Kanana
shechem.note: Nageng ye e holofeditšwego lapa le a thewa gomme kgwerano e fetišwa go tloga molokong go ya go o mongwe.
events: Go tsena Kanana, aletare ya mathomo — “ke tla fa ditlogolo tša gago naga ye”
Kgwerano (Gen 15) · Isaka · Jakobo
Barwa ba lesomepedi ba Jakobo — modu wa meloko ye lesomepedi

egypt.name: Egepeta (Goshene)
egypt.note: Lapa le fetoga setšhaba se segolo — ke moka la ba setšhaba sa makgoba.
events: Josefa, yo a rekišitšwego, o hlatlogela go buša Egepeta
Lapa lohle la Jakobo le theogela go tšhaba tlala
Setšhaba sa Israele se se golago se dirwa makgoba

sinai.name: Thaba ya Sinai
sinai.note: Topollo ye kgolo ya Testamente ya Kgale — makgoba a fetoga setšhaba sa Modimo.
events: Dikotsi tše lesome le kwanyana ya Paseka
Lewatle le Lehwibidu le a arogana mme ba a tshela
Melao ye Lesome, Molao, tabernakele le dihlabelo

kadesh.name: Kadeshe (lešoka)
kadesh.note: Go se dumele go amoga moloko naga — le ge go le bjalo Modimo o dula le bona.
events: Dihlodi tše lesomepedi — eupša setšhaba se gana go bota
Mengwaga ye 38 lešokeng — manna, leru le mollo
Molekong wa Moaba, thero ya mafelelo ya Moshe (Doiteronomio)

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Mafelelong ba tsena mme ba thopa naga ye e holofeditšwego.
events: Noka ya Jordane e a arogana mme setšhaba se a tshela
Maboto a Jeriko a a wa
Go thopa Kanana le go abelana naga

shiloh.name: Shilo (Baahlodi)
shiloh.note: Ka ge go se kgoši, yo mongwe le yo mongwe o dira boithatelo — kgoši ya nnete e a nyakega.
events: Tabernakele e hlongwa Shilo
Sediko sa sebe–kgateletšo–phološo (Debora, Gideone, Simsone)
Ruthe — potego mehleng ye lefsifsi, molokong wa Dafida

jerusalem.name: Jerusalema · Mmušo wo Kopanego
jerusalem.note: Mehla ya gauta ya Israele — le kholofetšo ya kgoši ya neng le neng.
events: Saulo kgoši ya mathomo, ke moka Dafida le Goliata
Kgwerano ya Dafida — “sedulo sa gago sa bogoši sa neng le neng” (2 Sam 7)
Salomo o aga tempele kua Jerusalema

samaria.name: Samaria · Mmušo wo Arogantšego
samaria.note: Mmušo o a arogana o theoga mola baprofeta ba goeletša.
events: Ka morago ga Salomo, karoganyo go ba Juda le Israele
Go khunamela medingwana go go boeletšwago
Eliya, Jesaya, Jeremia ba goeletša ‘sokologang’ — ba profetela Mesia

nineveh.name: Ninife (Asiria)
nineveh.note: Ka go hlokomologa temošo ye nngwe le ye nngwe, leboa le wa pele.
events: Ninife, motsemošate wa Asiria
Mmušo wa leboa o wela Asiria (722 PK)
Jona o romelwa Ninife

babylon.name: Babilone
babylon.note: Bošego bjo bo lefsifsi kudu — eupša kholofetšo ya tsošološo e sa dula.
events: Jerusalema e a wa, tempele e a swa (586 PK)
Juda e išwa Babilone
Daniele le Hesekiele — tumelo le dipono ka gare ga bothopša

susa.name: Susa (Persia)
susa.note: Le ka pelong ya mmušo wa baheitene, Modimo o boloka setšhaba sa gagwe.
events: Persia e wiša Babilone
Estere o phološa Bajuda tshenyegong
Nehemia o rapela pele ga kgoši mme a romelwa

return.name: Go boela Jerusalema
return.note: Ba a boa mme ba aga leswa — eupša ga go kgoši yo a tlilego. Ba letetše Mesia.
events: Makgetlo a mararo a go boa ka taelo ya Korese (Serubabele 538 · Esra 458 · Nehemia 444)
Tempele e agilwe leswa le maboto a Jerusalema a tsošološitšwe
Malakia — Testamente ya Kgale e a fela: “Ke roma motseta wa ka”

bethlehem.name: Betlelehema
bethlehem.note: Mesia yo a holofeditšwego o tla motseng wa Dafida — Lentšu le fetogile motho.
events: O belegwa Betlelehema, motse wa Dafida
Barongwa ba tsebiša badiši taba ye
Bahlalefi ba tla go mo khunamela

nazareth.name: Natsaretha
nazareth.note: Modimo o gola bjalo ka motho motseng wo o tlwaelegilego.
events: O godišitšwe ntlong ya mmetli
A na le mengwaga ye lesomepedi, o botšiša le go araba ka Tempeleng
Ka morago o ganwa sinagogeng ya gabo

jordan.name: Noka ya Jordane
jordan.note: Modiro wa gagwe wa phatlalatša o a thoma — legodimo le mo swaya bjalo ka Morwa.
events: O kolobetšwa ke Johanese
Moya o theogela bjalo ka leeba — “Yo ke Morwaka yo moratwa”
O fenya meleko ye meraro ya Sathane lešokeng

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Ka sešupo sa gagwe sa mathomo o utolla letago la gagwe.
events: O le moeng lenyalong
Meetse a fetošwa beine — sešupo sa gagwe sa mathomo
Barutiwa ba gagwe ba dumela go yena

sychar.name: Sikara (Samaria)
sychar.note: Tsela ya modiro wa mathomo — go phatša Jerusalema go ya Samaria ye e nyatšwago.
events: O hlwekiša Tempele kua Jerusalema
Bošego, Nikodemo — “o swanetše go tswalwa gape”
Meetse a bophelo go mosadi wa Samaria

capernaum.name: Kaperenaume
capernaum.today: mabopo a letsha la Galilea lehono
capernaum.note: Bodulo bja modiro wa Galilea — pitšo, thuto le kganetšo ka moka di kopanela mo.
events: O bitša barei ba dihlapi mme a itheela bodulo mo
Thuto ya Thabeng — “Go lehlogonolo bao ba ikokobeditšego moyeng”
Diswantšho tša mmušo — le kganetšo ye e golago

galilee.name: Letsha la Galilea
galilee.note: Ka maatla godimo ga tlhago o bontšha gore ke mang.
events: “Homola, iketle” — o iketliša ledimo
O fepa ba 5 000 ka dinkgwa tše tlhano le dihlapi tše pedi
O sepela godimo ga meetse

caesarea_p.name: Kesarea Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Barutiwa ba kwešiša gore ke Kriste, mme tsela ya sefapano e a bulega.
events: Boipolelo bja Petro — “Ke wena Mesia, Morwa wa Modimo yo a phelago”
O profeta lehu le tsogo ya gagwe la mathomo
O fetošwa ka letago thabeng

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Tseleng ya go rotogela Jerusalema, o nyaka ba ba timetšego.
events: O fa Baratimeose sefofu pono
O bitša Sakiose mokgethisi wa metšhelo
“Morwamotho o tletše go nyaka le go phološa ba ba timetšego”

bethany.name: Bethania
bethany.note: O bontšha maatla godimo ga lehu pele ga beke ya gagwe ya mafelelo.
events: O tsoša Latsaro lebitleng — “Ke nna tsogo le bophelo”
Maria o mo tlotša bakeng sa poloko
Sešupo se se tiiša maano a go mmolaya

jerusalem.name: Jerusalema
jerusalem.note: Sehlora seo Beibele ka moka e se šupago — sefapano, tsogo, rotogo.
events: Go tsena ka letago; o pshikologa ditafola tša Tempele gape
Sejong sa Mafelelo o hlapiša barutiwa maoto
O hwela sefapanong
O tsoga ka letšatši la boraro, ke moka a rotogela legodimong

antioch.name: Antiokia
antioch.note: Kereke ye e romago mo thomo ya baditšhaba e thomago le go boela gona.
events: Ka thapelo Moya o kgethela Baranaba le Saulo thoko
Kereke yeo go yona badumedi ba bilego ba thoma go bitšwa ‘Bakriste’
Lefelo la go thoma la maeto a 1, a 2 le a 3

seleucia.name: Selukia
seleucia.note: Boemakepe bja Antiokia — ba namela go ya Kipro.

salamis.name: Salamise (Kipro)
salamis.note: Boemo bja mathomo Kipro — go bolela disinagogeng.

paphos.name: Pafose
paphos.note: Maatla a bontšhwa go bao ba ganetšago ebangedi.
events: Elimase moloi o foufala
Sergio Paulose mmušiši o a dumela
Go tloga fa ‘Paulo’ o tšea boetapele

perga.name: Perega
perga.note: Boemakepe kua Pamfilia — mo Johanese Mareko a boelago morago.

pantioch.name: Antiokia ya Pisidia
pantioch.note: Ebangedi e bulega go leba go baditšhaba.
events: Thero ye telele ya histori ya phološo sinagogeng
Baditšhaba ba bantši ba thabela le go amogela lentšu
Ba rakwa ke kganetšo

iconium.name: Ikonio
iconium.note: Ba bantši ba a dumela, eupša tlaišo e ba gapeletša go ya pele.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: O bitšwa modimo, ke moka a kgatlwa ka maswika.
events: O fodiša monna wa go golofala go tloga matswalong
Lešaba le leka go ba direla dihlabelo bjalo ka medimo
O kgatlwa ka maswika a tlogelwa a nagana gore o hwile, eupša a tsoga

derbe.name: Derebe
derbe.note: Barutiwa ba bantši ba dirwa; ba boela morago go tiiša dikereke.

troas.name: Troase
troas.note: Phetogo mo ebangedi e lebago Yuropa la mathomo.
events: Pono ya monna wa Makedonia
“Tshelela kwano o re thuše”
Ba tshelela Yuropa gateetee

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.note: Kereke ya mathomo ya Yuropa — ebangedi e fenya le kgolegong.
events: Lidia, morekiši wa masela a bohwibidu, o a dumela
Lekgarebe la makgoba le le laolago o a lokollwa
Difela bošegogare, tšhišinyego ya lefase, lapa la molebeledi wa kgolego le a phološwa

thess.name: Thesalonika
thess.note: Lentšu le šikinya motse mme kganetšo e a tuka.
events: O ngangišana sinagogeng ka disabatha tše tharo
“Bao ba ferekantšego lefase”
Ba tšhaba bošego

berea.name: Berea
berea.note: Bao ba ‘hlomphegago’ ba ba ilego ba hlahloba lentšu ka bobona.
events: Ba amogela lentšu ka phišego
Ka letšatši le lengwe le le lengwe ba hlahloba Mangwalo go le lekola
Ba bantši ba fihla go dumela

athens.name: Athene
athens.note: Motseng wa bafilosofi o bolela ka ‘modimo yo o sa tsebjego’.
events: O tshwenywa ke motse o tletšego medingwana
Areopago o bolela ka Mmopi le tsogo
O kwerwa, eupša ba mmalwa ba a dumela

corinth.name: Korinte
corinth.note: O dula ngwaga le seripa, a thoma kereke motseng wa bobe.
events: O dira megope le Akwila le Priskila
“O se boife … gobane ke na le wena”
Bakorinte ba bantši ba dumela mme ba kolobetšwa

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Pelo ya leeto la boraro — lentšu le phatlalala go phatša Asia.
events: Thuto ya letšatši le letšatši ka mengwaga ye mebedi holong ya Tiranose
Dipuku tša boloi di a fišwa; mediro ye maatla
Demetrio moduba wa silibera o thoma pheretlego

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Go laelana ka meokgo le bagolo ba Efeso.
events: “Hlokomelang kereke ye a e rekilego ka madi a gagwe”
Bagolo ba a lla, ba tseba gore ba ka se sa mmona

caesarea.name: Kesarea
caesarea.note: Ka mengwaga ye mebedi o phemela ebangedi pele ga babušiši le kgoši.
events: Ditsheko pele ga babušiši Felikise le Fesetose
Tšhireletšo ya gagwe pele ga Kgoši Ageripa
“Ke ipiletša go Kesare” — go ya Roma

jerusalem.name: Jerusalema
jerusalem.note: O swarwa ka Tempeleng, tsela ya gagwe bjalo ka mogolegwa e a thoma.
events: O swarwa ke lešaba ka Tempeleng
O itšhireletša pele ga lekgotla
Bjalo ka moagi wa Roma, o romelwa ka tlhokomelo go Kesarea

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Ba fetela sekepeng sa Alekisandria se se lebilego Roma.

fairhaven.name: Maemakepe a Mabotse (Kreta)
fairhaven.note: Temošo ya Paulo ya go emiša go namela ga e kwewe.

crete.name: Kreta
crete.note: Ka morago ga go lokollwa, sehlakahlaka mo a tlogetšego Tito go lokiša dikereke.
events: O tlogela Tito go beakanya bagolo motseng o mongwe le o mongwe
O bitša baetapele ba ba sa solwego, ba ba botegago
O ngwala lengwalo go Tito

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Ka gare ga ledimo le go pšhatlaganya ga sekepe, kholofetšo ya Modimo e a swara.
events: ‘Ledimo la leboabohlabela’ le pšhatlaganya sekepe, eupša bohle ba 276 ba a phologa
O longwa ke noga, eupša ga a gobale
O fodiša balwetši ba sehlakahlaka

syracuse.name: Sirakuse
syracuse.note: Ba dula matšatši a mararo kua Sisili.

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Ba fihla Italy mme ba gahlanetšwa ke badumedi ka bona.

rome.name: Roma
rome.note: Ebangedi e fihla pelong ya mmušo mafelelong — e sego bofelo eupša mathomo.
events: Mengwaga ye mebedi a swaretšwe ntlong, a bolela mmušo ka sebete
Go tloga mo o ngwala Mangwalo a Kgolego (Baefeso·Bafilipi·Bakolose·Filemone)
Ka morago o golegwa gape, o ngwala 2 Timotheose mme a hwela tumelo — “Ke šiane mošianong wo mogolo, ke kgathile tema ke e weditše”

journeys.rome: Leeto la bone · go ya Roma
journeys.j5: Leeto la bohlano · ka morago ga go lokollwa
